$comment: Gateway events each mobile client intentionally does not handle yet, with a one-line reason. Consumed by scripts/check-protocol-event-coverage.mjs (pnpm check:protocol-coverage). Adding a gateway event without a client handler requires either handling it or adding an entry here; the check also fails when an entry goes stale (event removed or now handled).

ios.session.operation: Chat UI derives run state from chat/agent events; no session.operation consumer yet.
ios.session.tool: Session tool stream is not rendered by the iOS chat surface yet.
ios.sessions.changed: iOS refreshes session lists via explicit sessions.* requests instead of this push event.
ios.presence: Presence roster is a control-UI (web/desktop) surface; iOS does not render it.
ios.shutdown: iOS relies on socket close plus reconnect/backoff instead of the shutdown notice.
ios.heartbeat: iOS liveness uses tick and WebSocket-level ping; heartbeat is unused.
ios.cron: Cron run activity is not surfaced in the iOS app.
ios.node.pair.requested: Node pairing state is fetched on demand; no push consumer on iOS yet.
ios.node.pair.resolved: Node pairing state is fetched on demand; no push consumer on iOS yet.
ios.device.pair.requested: Device pairing flows poll via device.pair.* methods on iOS.
ios.device.pair.resolved: Device pairing flows poll via device.pair.* methods on iOS.
ios.voicewake.routing.changed: iOS only consumes voicewake.changed trigger updates; routing changes are not surfaced.
ios.exec.approval.requested: Handled in NodeAppModel via ExecApprovalNotificationBridge constants; the literal-only extractor cannot see constant case labels.
ios.exec.approval.resolved: Handled in NodeAppModel via ExecApprovalNotificationBridge constants; the literal-only extractor cannot see constant case labels.
ios.plugin.approval.requested: Plugin approval prompts are not implemented on iOS.
ios.plugin.approval.resolved: Plugin approval prompts are not implemented on iOS.
ios.terminal.data: Embedded terminal is a web/desktop surface; iOS has no terminal client.
ios.terminal.exit: Embedded terminal is a web/desktop surface; iOS has no terminal client.
ios.update.available: Gateway self-update notices do not apply to iOS; app updates ship via the App Store.

android.session.operation: Chat UI derives run state from chat/agent events; no session.operation consumer yet.
android.session.tool: Session tool stream is not rendered by the Android chat surface yet.
android.presence: Presence roster is a control-UI (web/desktop) surface; Android does not render it.
android.talk.mode: Android toggles talk mode locally; gateway talk.mode sync is not consumed.
android.shutdown: Android relies on socket close plus reconnect/backoff instead of the shutdown notice.
android.heartbeat: Android liveness uses tick and WebSocket-level ping; heartbeat is unused.
android.cron: Cron run activity is not surfaced in the Android app.
android.node.pair.requested: Android's bounded operator session lacks operator.pairing; onboarding refreshes node approval with explicit node.list requests.
android.node.pair.resolved: Android's bounded operator session lacks operator.pairing; onboarding refreshes node approval with explicit node.list requests.
android.device.pair.requested: Device pairing flows poll via device.pair.* methods on Android.
android.device.pair.resolved: Device pairing flows poll via device.pair.* methods on Android.
android.voicewake.changed: Android reads voicewake state on demand via voicewake.get; no push consumer yet.
android.voicewake.routing.changed: Android reads voicewake state on demand via voicewake.get; no push consumer yet.
android.plugin.approval.requested: Plugin approval prompts are not implemented on Android.
android.plugin.approval.resolved: Plugin approval prompts are not implemented on Android.
android.terminal.data: Embedded terminal is a web/desktop surface; Android has no terminal client.
android.terminal.exit: Embedded terminal is a web/desktop surface; Android has no terminal client.
